description_long: This is a round table with a marble-like top featuring a subtle, light blue-gray veining pattern. The tabletop has a central circular section that appears slightly raised or distinct, possibly indicating a rotating or removable feature. The base is a single, wide cylindrical pedestal with a metallic, bronze or gold finish, providing both stability and a modern aesthetic. The table's design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a smooth surface. The materials and finish suggest it is both durable and visually striking, suitable for upscale urban environments. The overall appearance is elegant, making it a focal point in any setting.
description: A round, marble-patterned table with a metallic pedestal base and a central circular feature, combining elegance and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round tabletop with its marble pattern and the central circular section clearly visible, along with the metallic pedestal base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the veining on the tabletop and the reflective quality of the base.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the smooth, continuous edge of the tabletop and the symmetry of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Rear view with the marble pattern and central feature still visible, showing the consistent design around the table.
